groups.titleZh: COPR 模拟考试（600题中随机50题）
groups.descriptionEn: Expanded PCP written exam mock bank. Each start draws a random 50-question exam from a 600-question COPR-style bank.
groups.descriptionZh: 加厚后的 PCP written exam 模拟题库。每次开始都会从 600 题 COPR 风格题库中随机抽 50 题。

questions.questionEn: A 2-year-old patient has snoring respirations with reduced LOC. Which finding most strongly suggests the patient is entering a higher-risk state?
questions.questionZh: 一名 2 岁病人出现snoring respirations with reduced LOC。哪项发现最提示病人正进入更高风险状态？

options.zh: 气道保护能力下降且通气质量恶化
options.en: Loss of airway protection with worsening ventilation quality

options.zh: 一旦形成初步印象就跳过 reassessment
options.en: Skip reassessment once an initial impression has been formed

options.zh: 等到诊断完全确定后再行动
options.en: Delay action until the diagnosis is fully certain

options.zh: 即使风险在变化，也把文书或沟通当成次要事项
options.en: Treat documentation or communication as secondary even when risk is changing

questions.explanationEn: This COPR-style item tests airway and ventilation using entry-to-practice written exam logic. The correct answer is the safest PCP-level choice because it recognizes the main threat, prioritizes appropriately, and avoids common exam traps such as delay, false reassurance, or overvaluing a flashy option.
questions.explanationZh: 这道 COPR 风格题目用的是 entry-to-practice written exam 的逻辑来考 Airway and Ventilation。正确答案之所以正确，是因为它代表最安全的 PCP 级选择：能抓住主要威胁、正确排优先级，并避开常见考试陷阱，例如拖延、虚假安心，或高估看起来花哨的选项。

questions.questionEn: A PCP assesses a patient with shortness of breath with increasing work of breathing. What is the best immediate priority?
questions.questionZh: PCP 评估一名出现shortness of breath with increasing work of breathing的病人。当前最好的立即优先处理是什么？

options.zh: 呼吸工作量上升并出现疲劳迹象
options.en: Rising work of breathing with signs of fatigue

options.zh: 因为某一个线索看起来放心就假设病人稳定
options.en: Assume the patient is stable because one finding looks reassuring

options.zh: 等到诊断完全确定后再行动
options.en: Delay action until the diagnosis is fully certain

options.zh: 选择听起来最高级、但不一定最安全的 PCP 答案
options.en: Choose the most advanced-sounding option even if it is not the safest PCP answer

options.en: Treat documentation or communication as secondary even when risk is changing

options.en: Delay action until the diagnosis is fully certain

options.zh: 因为某一个线索看起来放心就假设病人稳定
options.en: Assume the patient is stable because one finding looks reassuring

questions.questionZh: 一道关于documentation of changing findings的题干故意诱导考生盯错重点。最安全的 PCP 级选择是什么？

options.zh: 先传达最重要风险的选项
options.en: The option that communicates the most important risk first

options.zh: 即使风险在变化，也把文书或沟通当成次要事项
options.en: Treat documentation or communication as secondary even when risk is changing

options.zh: 一旦形成初步印象就跳过 reassessment
options.en: Skip reassessment once an initial impression has been formed

options.zh: 选择听起来最高级、但不一定最安全的 PCP 答案
options.en: Choose the most advanced-sounding option even if it is not the safest PCP answer

questions.explanationEn: This COPR-style item tests communication and documentation using entry-to-practice written exam logic. The correct answer is the safest PCP-level choice because it recognizes the main threat, prioritizes appropriately, and avoids common exam traps such as delay, false reassurance, or overvaluing a flashy option.
questions.explanationZh: 这道 COPR 风格题目用的是 entry-to-practice written exam 的逻辑来考 Communication and Documentation。正确答案之所以正确，是因为它代表最安全的 PCP 级选择：能抓住主要威胁、正确排优先级，并避开常见考试陷阱，例如拖延、虚假安心，或高估看起来花哨的选项。

questions.questionEn: A patient with scene flow affecting care looks similar at first glance, but which trend matters most over the next few minutes?
questions.questionZh: 一名出现scene flow affecting care的病人表面看起来变化不大，但接下来几分钟里哪种趋势最重要？

options.zh: 把移动和准备当成安全问题的选择
options.en: The choice that treats movement and setup as safety issues

options.zh: 因为某一个线索看起来放心就假设病人稳定
options.en: Assume the patient is stable because one finding looks reassuring

options.zh: 等到诊断完全确定后再行动
options.en: Delay action until the diagnosis is fully certain

options.zh: 选择听起来最高级、但不一定最安全的 PCP 答案
options.en: Choose the most advanced-sounding option even if it is not the safest PCP answer

The correct answer is the safest PCP-level choice because it recognizes the main threat, prioritizes appropriately, and avoids common exam traps such as delay, false reassurance, or overvaluing a flashy option.
